title: AC Unit Controller
description: The AC Unit Controller function block is used to control air conditioning units.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Starts with the falling edge of input (Pt). Keeps the device paused for the specified duration.
Hysteresis for switching on and off. This setting only applies when the target temperature is managed by the Intelligent Room Controller (enabled automatically).

Target temperature offset in relation to received target temperature. This setting only applies when the target temperature is managed by the Intelligent Room Controller (enabled automatically) and the controller is in Eco or Eco2 (building protection) mode.
Lowest target temperature which can be set in the App
Highest target temperature which can be set in the App

properties.description: Configure usage and naming of operating modes
Configure usage and naming of airflow-directions
Configure usage and naming of fanspeeds
Fan Speed which is set when silent mode is activated
Airflow-direction which is set when the AC is switched off
Fan Speed which is set when the AC is switched off
Specifies whether the system uses the last applied default target temperature or a manually defined fixed value.
Number of entries in the activity log. 0: log is disabled The activity log tracks relevant changes since program start.
If checked, the ϑc input of the AC Unit Controller or ϑc of the connected Intelligent Room Controller is forwarded to the indoor unit.
